title: Dell Stock Snaps 8-Day Winning Streak Even as AI Server Rivals Soar
sentences: Dell Stock Snaps 8-Day Winning Streak Even as AI Server Rivals Soar Dell Technologies  stock slid on Tuesday and the PC and server maker snapped a recent eight session winning streak.
Fellow AI server maker  Super Micro Computer Inc.  had a much better session.
Dell has been on a tear lately, surging thanks to stellar first-quarter earnings and a new laptop to compete with  Apple  latest hardware.
